productDisplayName: FILA Men Impact White Sports Shoes
description: Perfect for those who love that sweat-breaking workout and runs, the fila Intense shoe is designed to help your burn more calories with much ease.UpperMesh upper for absolute breathable comfortStrategically placed synthetic overlays for shoe support and durabilityHeavily padded and meshed tongue and collar for snug, customised comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortFabric footbed for sweat-free wearRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleTPR outsole with traingular lugs on the forefoot and a decoupled heel for absolute gripFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy foot movementScooped heel to offer cushioned comfortTrusstic shank in the midfoot for inner-arch supportShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
